case_title: STANZLER, JORDAN S. ESQ. et al VS THOMAS D. VOISS, CHAIRMAN, AND LAWSTAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY STANZLER, JORDAN S. ESQ. ANDERSON, KILL & OLICK AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS D. VOISS, CHAIRMAN, AND LAWSTAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
